captured_evidence.note: Portal /healthz probed over TLS through scripts/validate/admin_gui_smoke.sh with PORTAL_BASE_URL set (Batch 23 Task 3). Scope: the portal served as a local process wired to the repository contracts, probed on its TLS liveness surface; OpenSearch Dashboards was deployed on the harness cluster but not probed in this capture. Interactive login flows remain declared, not captured.
